meta.title: The dingo debate
meta.sourceDoc: 51. P2 - The dingo debate 澳洲野犬_澳洲野狗.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The dingo debate 澳洲野犬

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：E
PDF 定位：..it is there to keep dingoes out of southeast... the fence separates the main types of livestock found in Australia. To the northwest of the fence, cattle predominate; to the southwest, sheep fll the landscape." (段 E)
PDF 解析：描述了2500km长的栅栏，既阻挡野狗，又把两种外来经济动物一 牛和羊 分隔在两侧。

题目 15
答案：D
PDF 定位：" Johnson says dingoes are the solution... because they keep cat and fox dingoes will kill them simply to lessen competition. (段 D)
PDF 解析：说明野狗通过捕食甚至"竞争性捕杀"猫、孤来防止竞争物种数量过大。

题目 16
答案：C
PDF 定位："Rabbits provide huge prey base for two other introduced species: the feral (wild) cat and the red fox." (段 C)
PDF 解析：提到遍布全国的外来物种"免子"，并点出猫、狐狸依赖其为食。

题目 17
答案：B
PDF 定位："About 4 0oo years ago, Asian sailors introduced dingoes to Australia." (段B)
PDF 解析：明确说明野狗抵达澳大利亚的时间和方式。

题目 18
答案：F
PDF 定位：...some of the highest rates of calf predation occurred in areas that had been
PDF 解析：LeeAllen的研究发现：被诱杀后返巢的年轻野狗捕食小牛犊，表明野狗开始 吃幼年家畜。

题目 19
答案：A
PDF 定位：".drop 1 ooo small pieces of meat... each piece laced with poison; this practice is known as baiting." (段 A)
PDF 解析：详细描述了飞机投放毒肉诱杀（baiting）的方法。

题目 20
答案：D
PDF 解析：解释了群体结构（仅一只可繁殖雌性）如何限制种群增长速度。

questionSections.text:
题目 21
答案：D
PDF 定位：..he is not convinced that they manage to catch cats that often, believing they are more likely to catch small native animals instead." (段G)
PDF 解析：Clifford认为野狗主要捕食本土小动物，而不是其他外来捕食者（猫)。

题目 22
答案：A
PDF 定位："Stuart McKechnie complains that graziers' livelihoods are threatened when dingoes prey on cattle." (段 A)
PDF 解析：McKechnie指出野狗威胁牧民收入。

题目 23
答案：B
PDF 定位："In the 4 ooo years that dingoes have been Australia, they have contributed to few, if any, extinctions, Johnson says." (段 D)
PDF 解析：Johnson认为野狗对物种灭绝影响甚微。

items.text:
题目 21
答案：D
PDF 定位：..he is not convinced that they manage to catch cats that often, believing they are more likely to catch small native animals instead." (段G)
PDF 解析：Clifford认为野狗主要捕食本土小动物，而不是其他外来捕食者（猫)。

题目 22
答案：A
PDF 定位："Stuart McKechnie complains that graziers' livelihoods are threatened when dingoes prey on cattle." (段 A)
PDF 解析：McKechnie指出野狗威胁牧民收入。

题目 23
答案：B
PDF 定位："In the 4 ooo years that dingoes have been Australia, they have contributed to few, if any, extinctions, Johnson says." (段 D)
PDF 解析：Johnson认为野狗对物种灭绝影响甚微。

questionSections.text:
题目 24
答案：tasmanian tiger
PDF 定位：...as the Tasmanian tiger disappeared completely from Australia, dingoes became Australia's top predators." (段 B)
PDF 解析：说明袋狼消失后由野狗取代其顶级捕食者地位。

题目 25
答案：rabbits
PDF 定位：..when bad seasons follow, rabbit numbers are significantly reduced and the dwindling but stillarge fox and cat populations are left with little to eat besides nativemammals.(段C)
PDF 解析：当兔子数量下降时，狐与猫更倾向捕食本土动物。

题目 26
答案：overpopulation
PDF 定位："Australian mammals generally reproduce much more slowly... an adaption to prevent overpopulation in the arid environment..." (段 D)
PDF 解析：慢速繁殖是一种避免"过度繁殖"（overpopulation）的自然适应。
